questions.question: Name the two guys who were friendly neighbors of Laverne and Shirley.
What Coca-Cola diet drink was especially popular in the 70s and 80s, but saw decline in sales after the introduction of Diet Coke in 1982?
What were the first lines of The Jeffersons' theme song?
questions.answer: "Well we're movin' on up to the East Side."

questions.question: What was the nickname of the pass reception between Joe Montana and Dwight Clark in the 1981 NFC Championship Game?
In what classic ad campaign were Americans told, 'Don't leave home without it.'?
